# NoJS Elements

> NoJS Elements is a UI element plugin library for the No.JS HTML-first reactive framework. 17 declarative, accessible components â€” zero JavaScript required from developers. Everything is driven by HTML attributes. Requires No.JS >= 1.13.0.

NoJS Elements provides drag-and-drop, form validation, tooltips, popovers, modals, dropdowns, toasts, tabs, trees, steppers, skeletons, split panes, sortable tables, accordions, breadcrumbs, scroll spy, and virtual lists. When loaded via CDN `<script>` tag, it auto-installs itself into NoJS â€” no `NoJS.use()` call needed. Each element injects scoped CSS (`.nojs-*` classes) and adds full ARIA accessibility and keyboard navigation out of the box.

## Installation

- [Getting Started](https://elements.no-js.dev/): CDN script tag usage, peer dependency on No.JS

## Drag & Drop

- [DnD](https://elements.no-js.dev/dnd): `drag`, `drop`, `drag-list`, `drag-multiple`; single-item and multi-select drag-and-drop, sortable lists, placeholder insertion, ghost element, cross-container transfers

## Forms

- [Validation](https://elements.no-js.dev/validation): `validate` directive on `<form>` with `$form` context (`valid`, `dirty`, `touched`, `submitting`, `errors`, `values`, `fields`, `reset()`); built-in pipe rules (`required`, `email`, `min`, `max`, `url`, `custom`), native ValidityState passthrough (`minlength`, `maxlength`, `pattern`), custom validators via `NoJS.validator()`, per-field `validate-on` triggers, `validate-if` conditional rules, `error-class` styling

## Interaction Elements

- [Dropdown](https://elements.no-js.dev/dropdown): `dropdown`, `dropdown-toggle`, `dropdown-menu`, `dropdown-item`; Popover API light-dismiss, keyboard navigation, disabled items
- [Modal](https://elements.no-js.dev/modal): `modal`, `modal-open`, `modal-close`; focus trap, stacking/nesting, backdrop control, Escape disable, template usage
- [Popover](https://elements.no-js.dev/popover): `popover`, `popover-trigger`, `popover-dismiss`; native Popover API, flip logic, proximity-based triggers

## Feedback Elements

- [Toast](https://elements.no-js.dev/toast): `toast-container`, `toast` directive, `$toast()` global function; 6 positions, auto-dismiss, types (info/success/warning/error)
- [Tooltip](https://elements.no-js.dev/tooltip): `tooltip` with position, delay, and disabled state; viewport-aware positioning

## Layout Elements

- [Tabs](https://elements.no-js.dev/tabs): `tabs`, `tab`, `panel`; 4 positions (top/bottom/left/right), disabled tabs, roving tabindex
- [Split / Pane](https://elements.no-js.dev/split): `split`, `pane`; horizontal/vertical, min/max constraints, collapsible, persisted layout via localStorage
- [Tree](https://elements.no-js.dev/tree): `tree`, `branch`, `subtree`, `tree-drag-mode`; expand/collapse, selection, typeahead search, dynamic data binding, drag-and-drop (reparent/reorder/both)

## Data & Progress Elements

- [Sortable Table](https://elements.no-js.dev/table): `sortable`, `sort`, `fixed-header`, `fixed-col`, `table-reorder`; string/number/date sorting, sticky headers and columns, 3-state cycling, drag-and-drop row reordering
- [Stepper](https://elements.no-js.dev/stepper): `stepper`, `step`, `stepper-validate`; linear/free mode, validation gate (form-based + expression-based), `$stepper` API (next/prev/goTo), progress indicator
- [Skeleton](https://elements.no-js.dev/skeleton): `skeleton` with text/circle/rect types, multi-line, shimmer animation, reactive loading state

## Navigation & Structure Elements

- [Accordion](https://elements.no-js.dev/accordion): `accordion`; animated expand/collapse on native `<details>` elements, single/multi mode, keyboard navigation, CSS custom properties
- [Breadcrumb](https://elements.no-js.dev/breadcrumb): `breadcrumb`; accessible breadcrumb trail, manual child mode or auto-track from router, custom separators via CSS custom properties
- [Scroll Spy](https://elements.no-js.dev/scroll-spy): `spy`, `spy-offset`, `spy-threshold`; highlights navigation links based on visible sections, IntersectionObserver-based, dynamic target support
- [Virtual List](https://elements.no-js.dev/virtual-list): `virtual-height`, `virtual-buffer`; efficient DOM virtualization for large datasets, fixed or auto-measured row heights, table/list/dl support

## Reference

- [Full Documentation](https://elements.no-js.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation for all 17 elements in a single file for deep context

## Ecosystem

- [No.JS Framework](https://no-js.dev/): The core HTML-first reactive framework (required peer dependency)
- [No.JS Full Docs](https://no-js.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete No.JS framework documentation
- [NoJS LSP](https://lsp.no-js.dev/): VS Code extension with completion, hover, and diagnostics for No.JS directives
- [NoJS Skill](https://github.com/no-js-dev/nojs-skill): AI agent reference for No.JS â€” full directive, filter, and validation docs
- [GitHub](https://github.com/no-js-dev/nojs-elements): Source code, issues, and contributions
